findings.finding: test_skill_md_phase_end_medium_annotation_present searches the full SKILL.md for the annotation string without a position/section check. The string is distinctive and currently unique, but the test would pass even if the string migrated to an unrelated section. Low risk given the string's specificity.

test_medium_stage4_tester_not_expected_no_synthetic_critical guards the function contract given already-correct expected_roles, but does not test that a revert of the convergence.md Medium Stage 4 row would propagate to the caller. The TestSkillContentIntegrity class covers the table row independently, so the gap is closed by the combination — but the inter-class dependency is implicit.
